overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a Western-themed video game (Red Dead Redemption 2), showing a character in a cowboy hat standing on a wooden porch overlooking a frontier town. A horse-drawn stagecoach passes along the dirt road below while the camera pans to follow its movement, followed by a covered wagon entering the frame as the clip ends.

two-story red brick building with white trim across the dirt road
weathered wooden picket fence running alongside the road
unpaved dirt main street through the frontier town
poster affixed to the red brick building wall
snow-capped mountains visible in the distance under blue sky

segments.scene_description: The character stands on a wooden porch overlooking a quiet frontier town street. The view shows traditional wooden buildings, a red brick structure with a wanted poster, and mountains in the distance. The scene is still with no traffic or pedestrians visible.

scene_state.functional_zone: wooden porch overlooking frontier town main street with passing traffic

events.description: horse-drawn stagecoach enters from the right and begins crossing the frame
stagecoach exits the frame to the left

agents.ego_description: watching the stagecoach pass by from the porch, turning head to follow its movement

notable_agents.action: horse-drawn stagecoach moving from right to left along the dirt road

segments.scene_description: A horse-drawn stagecoach enters from the right and travels across the view along the dirt road. The camera pans left to follow the carriage as it passes the red brick building and exits toward the left side of town.

scene_state.functional_zone: wooden porch overlooking frontier town main street

events.description: covered wagon enters from the right as the clip ends

agents.ego_description: continuing to observe the street as a covered wagon approaches from the right

segments.scene_description: After the stagecoach passes, the street is momentarily empty before a covered wagon enters from the right side of the frame. The clip ends as the wagon begins to cross the view.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a still observation of a quiet frontier town to a dynamic view of passing horse-drawn traffic. It begins with a stationary view from a wooden porch, overlooking a silent dirt street lined with wooden buildings, a red brick structure with a wanted poster, and distant mountains. As a horse-drawn stagecoach enters from the right, the camera pans left to track the carriage as it travels past the brick building and exits the frame. The street then returns to a momentary stillness before a covered wagon enters from the right, shifting the focus once more as the vehicle begins to cross the view.
